Definition: Unique purchase-order identifier after approved corrections.
Analysis_Treatment: 400 unique values in the official cleaned dataset.

Definition: Purchase-order date.
Formula_or_Rule: True spreadsheet date displayed as yyyy-mm-dd.
Analysis_Treatment: All 400 dates included.

Definition: Calendar month of PO_Date.
Analysis_Treatment: Validated against PO_Date for every row.

Definition: Construction project associated with the purchase order.
Analysis_Treatment: Used for Q1 project aggregation.

Definition: Geographic operating region.
Analysis_Treatment: Retained; not used as a primary Q1–Q5 grouping.

Definition: Officer responsible for the procurement transaction.
Analysis_Treatment: Retained for traceability.

Definition: Procurement material/work category.
Analysis_Treatment: Used for Q1 and Q4 aggregation.

Definition: Description of the item or work purchased.
Analysis_Treatment: Retained for transaction detail.

Definition: Supplier for the purchase order.
Analysis_Treatment: Used for Q2 and Q4 supplier analysis.

Definition: Method used to procure the order.
Formula_or_Rule: Categorical field with five observed values.
Analysis_Treatment: Used for Q3; Invitational has no observed records.

Definition: Number of units purchased.
Analysis_Treatment: Used to validate PO Value and Budget Value.

Definition: Unit of measure.
Analysis_Treatment: Retained for transaction detail.

Definition: Actual unit price in Canadian dollars.
Analysis_Treatment: Four corrected/derived values documented in Audit_Log.

Definition: Budgeted unit price in Canadian dollars.
Analysis_Treatment: Authoritative source field.

Definition: Actual purchase-order value in Canadian dollars.
Analysis_Treatment: Rows 46 and 224 reconstructed as Budget Value + Cost Variance.

Definition: Budgeted purchase-order value in Canadian dollars.
Analysis_Treatment: Authoritative for all records.

Definition: Difference between actual PO value and budget.
Analysis_Treatment: Positive = over budget; negative = under budget.

Definition: Cost variance as a percentage of budget.
Analysis_Treatment: Stored as percentage points rounded to one decimal.

Definition: Supplier lead time in calendar days.
Formula_or_Rule: Observed value; two approved Civil Works imputations = 45.
Analysis_Treatment: Q4 uses Delivered orders only.

Definition: Whether delivery was recorded on time.
Analysis_Treatment: Q4 numerator counts Yes among Delivered orders.

Definition: Current delivery state.
Formula_or_Rule: Delivered, Partially Delivered, Pending, or Cancelled.
Analysis_Treatment: Q4 includes Delivered only; all other statuses excluded.

Definition: Net aggregate cost variance for a project or category.
Analysis_Treatment: Rank descending; positive values are overruns.

Definition: Net aggregate variance relative to aggregate budget.
Analysis_Treatment: Weighted aggregate percentage, not average row percentage.

Definition: Supplier-level majority and net-positive rule.
Formula_or_Rule: >50% of POs above budget AND total Cost_Variance_CAD > 0.
Analysis_Treatment: Qualifiers ranked by average variance descending.

Definition: Association between method and normalized row variance.
Formula_or_Rule: One-way ANOVA and Kruskal-Wallis on Variance_%; α = 0.05.
Analysis_Treatment: Observational, not causal.

Definition: Share of Delivered orders recorded Yes.
Formula_or_Rule: COUNTIFS(Delivery_Status, Delivered, On_Time_Delivery, Yes) ÷ COUNTIF(Delivery_Status, Delivered).
Analysis_Treatment: Pending, Cancelled, and Partially Delivered excluded.

Definition: Best-to-worst delivery-performance order.
Formula_or_Rule: On-time rate descending; average lead time ascending; name ascending.
Analysis_Treatment: Applied separately to categories and suppliers.

Definition: Comparison of blank lead times with approved 45-day values.
Formula_or_Rule: Recalculate Delivered-only lead-time metrics and ranks under both scenarios.
Analysis_Treatment: No category rank, supplier rank, on-time rate, or recommendation changes.
